title: ZOME — Cross-platform product suite
description: End-to-end product suite spanning iOS, Android, and Apple Vision Pro — built with Flutter and native platform SDKs.

title: Chatty Prayers
description: AI-assisted prayer and devotional web app built with Blazor WebAssembly.

title: Spatial UI Components
description: A library of reusable spatial UI components for Apple Vision Pro using RealityKit and SwiftUI.

title: PDF Form Builder
description: A browser-based drag-and-drop editor for building and exporting PDF forms.

title: Heuristic Search in Robotic Task Planning
description: Academic research into heuristic search algorithms applied to autonomous robotic task planning.
